# Teen Mental Health Analysis

##  Project Overview

This project analyzes a Teen Mental Health dataset using Python. The goal is to understand factors affecting teenagers' mental health through data cleaning, exploratory data analysis (EDA), and visualization.

---

##  Technologies Used

- Python
- Pandas
- NumPy
- Matplotlib
- Jupyter Notebook

---

##  Dataset

The dataset contains information related to teen mental health, including demographic and behavioral variables used for analysis.

---

##  Project Workflow

- Data Loading
- Data Cleaning
- Missing Value Treatment
- Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
- Data Visualization
- Insights

---

##  Current Status

🚧 This project is still under development.

Planned improvements:

- Feature Engineering
- Machine Learning Models
- Better Visualizations
- Dashboard Creation

---
